name: DropdownMenu
description: Menu button with items, separators, submenus, and checkboxes.

api.name: DropdownMenu
api.description: Menu button with items, separators, submenus, and checkboxes.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger and content that make up the menu (typically a DropdownMenuTrigger plus a DropdownMenuContent).

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Whether the menu panel is open. Controlled together with OpenChanged; leave unbound to let the trigger own the state internally.

parameters.name: OpenChanged
parameters.description: Fires whenever the open state changes (trigger click, Escape, click-outside, item selection).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the root wrapper.

events.name: OpenChanged
events.description: Fires whenever the open state changes (trigger click, Escape, click-outside, item selection).

enums.name: MenuItemVariant
enums.description: Visual variant for a menu item (DropdownMenu / ContextMenu / Menubar). Mirrors shadcn/ui's variant prop on menu items. In addition to the applied Tailwind classes, the item emits a data-variant attribute so consumers can drive their own data-[variant=destructive]:… CSS.

records.name: DropdownMenuContext
records.signature: DropdownMenuContext(bool IsOpen, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, string WrapperId, string ContentId)

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The item's label content, rendered after the checkmark indicator.

parameters.name: Checked
parameters.description: Whether the checkbox item is checked. Controlled together with CheckedChanged; when left unbound the item tracks its own toggles internally.

parameters.name: CheckedChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the user clicks the item, with the new checked state.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the item's root button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the item's root button.

events.name: CheckedChanged
events.description: Fires when the user clicks the item, with the new checked state.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The menu's items (typically DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuSeparator, etc.).

parameters.name: Align
parameters.description: Alignment of the panel relative to the trigger along the cross axis. Defaults to Start.

parameters.name: Side
parameters.description: Which side of the trigger the panel opens on. Defaults to Bottom.

parameters.name: ShowArrow
parameters.description: When true, renders a small pointer arrow on the panel edge facing the trigger.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the panel.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the panel.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The grouped menu items, typically a run of DropdownMenuItem.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name for the group's role="group" container, exposed via aria-label.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the group container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the group container.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The item's label content.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Fires when the item is activated (click or Enter/Space). The menu closes right after this callback runs.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, the item is not clickable/focusable and renders with reduced opacity.

parameters.name: Inset
parameters.description: Indents the item by a label's width so it lines up with checkbox/radio items in the same menu (shadcn inset). Adds ps-8 and emits data-inset.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual variant. Destructive renders the item in the destructive color and emits data-variant="destructive".

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the item's root button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the item's root button.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Fires when the item is activated (click or Enter/Space). The menu closes right after this callback runs.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The label text or markup.

parameters.name: Inset
parameters.description: Indents the label to align with inset items (shadcn inset).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the label element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the label element.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The group's DropdownMenuRadioItem options.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The currently selected item's value. Controlled together with ValueChanged; when left unbound the group tracks the selection internally.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the user selects a different radio item.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the group's role="group" container.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Fires when the user selects a different radio item.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The item's label content, rendered after the selection dot.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The value this item represents. Selecting it sets the parent DropdownMenuRadioGroup's value to this.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the item's root button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the item's root button.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the separator line.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the separator line.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The shortcut hint text (e.g. "⌘K").

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the shortcut span.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the shortcut span.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The submenu's trigger and content (typically a DropdownMenuSubTrigger plus a DropdownMenuSubContent).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the submenu's root wrapper.

records.name: DropdownMenuSubContext
records.signature:
DropdownMenuSubContext(
        bool IsOpen,
        EventCallback<bool> SetOpen,
        string WrapperId,
        string TriggerId,
        string ContentId,
        EventCallback CloseTree,
        Action ScheduleClose,
        Action CancelClose,
        EventCallback OpenByKeyboard,
        Func<bool> ConsumeKeyboardOpen)

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The submenu's items (typically DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuSeparator, etc.).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the submenu panel.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the submenu panel.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger's label content, rendered before the chevron indicator.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, the trigger is not clickable/focusable and cannot open the submenu.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger's root button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger's root button.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger's content, rendered inside the wrapper (or forwarded into ChildContentSlot when AsChild is set).

parameters.name: ChildContentSlot
parameters.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

parameters.name: AsChild
parameters.description: When true, renders NO wrapper and cascades a TriggerSlot (carrying group + data-state so a descendant chevron still rotates, plus the trigger id and menu ARIA) that a cooperating child folds onto its own single root element — the Radix asChild goal. Prefer a <button> child. Default false keeps the current role=button wrapper.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true the trigger ignores clicks and is marked aria-disabled. The live @onclick sits on this outer role="button" element, not the wrapped Button, so disabling only the inner button (as DropdownButton/SplitButton do) previously still let a click on the trigger padding open the menu — this gates that.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger wrapper (ignored when AsChild is set — the child owns its own classes via the slot).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger wrapper (or merges into the TriggerSlot's attributes when AsChild is set).

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The trigger and content that make up the menu (typically a DropdownMenuTrigger plus a DropdownMenuContent).

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The item's label content, rendered after the checkmark indicator.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The menu's items (typically DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuSeparator, etc.).

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The grouped menu items, typically a run of DropdownMenuItem.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The item's label content, rendered after the selection dot.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The submenu's trigger and content (typically a DropdownMenuSubTrigger plus a DropdownMenuSubContent).

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The submenu's items (typically DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuSeparator, etc.).

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The trigger's label content, rendered before the chevron indicator.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The trigger's content, rendered inside the wrapper (or forwarded into ChildContentSlot when AsChild is set).

slots.name: ChildContentSlot
slots.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

mdSummary:
# DropdownMenu

Menu button with items, separators, submenus, and checkboxes.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/dropdown-menu

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DropdownMenu | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The trigger and content that make up the menu (typically a DropdownMenuTrigger plus a DropdownMenuContent). |
| DropdownMenu | Open | `bool` | `false` | Whether the menu panel is open. Controlled together with OpenChanged; leave unbound to let the trigger own the state internally. |
| DropdownMenu | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` | Fires whenever the open state changes (trigger click, Escape, click-outside, item selection). |
| DropdownMenu | IsOpen | `bool` | `false` |  |
| DropdownMenu | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenu | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the root wrapper. |
| DropdownMenuCheckboxItem | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuCheckboxItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The item's label content, rendered after the checkmark indicator. |
| DropdownMenuCheckboxItem | Checked | `bool` | `false` | Whether the checkbox item is checked. Controlled together with CheckedChanged; when left unbound the item tracks its own toggles internally. |
| DropdownMenuCheckboxItem | CheckedChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` | Fires when the user clicks the item, with the new checked state. |
| DropdownMenuCheckboxItem | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the item's root button. |
| DropdownMenuCheckboxItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the item's root button. |
| DropdownMenuContent | Context | `DropdownMenu.DropdownMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| DropdownMenuContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The menu's items (typically DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuSeparator, etc.). |
| DropdownMenuContent | Align | `Lumeo.Align` | `Lumeo.Align.Start` | Alignment of the panel relative to the trigger along the cross axis. Defaults to Start. |
| DropdownMenuContent | Side | `Lumeo.Side` | `Lumeo.Side.Bottom` | Which side of the trigger the panel opens on. Defaults to Bottom. |
| DropdownMenuContent | ShowArrow | `bool` | `false` | When true, renders a small pointer arrow on the panel edge facing the trigger. |
| DropdownMenuContent | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the panel. |
| DropdownMenuContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the panel. |
| DropdownMenuGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The grouped menu items, typically a run of DropdownMenuItem. |
| DropdownMenuGroup | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible name for the group's role="group" container, exposed via aria-label. |
| DropdownMenuGroup | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the group container. |
| DropdownMenuGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the group container. |
| DropdownMenuItem | Context | `DropdownMenu.DropdownMenuContext?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuItem | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The item's label content. |
| DropdownMenuItem | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` | Fires when the item is activated (click or Enter/Space). The menu closes right after this callback runs. |
| DropdownMenuItem | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | When true, the item is not clickable/focusable and renders with reduced opacity. |
| DropdownMenuItem | Inset | `bool` | `false` | Indents the item by a label's width so it lines up with checkbox/radio items in the same menu (shadcn inset). Adds ps-8 and emits data-inset. |
| DropdownMenuItem | Variant | `MenuItemVariant` | `MenuItemVariant.Default` | Visual variant. Destructive renders the item in the destructive color and emits data-variant="destructive". |
| DropdownMenuItem | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the item's root button. |
| DropdownMenuItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the item's root button. |
| DropdownMenuLabel | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The label text or markup. |
| DropdownMenuLabel | Inset | `bool` | `false` | Indents the label to align with inset items (shadcn inset). |
| DropdownMenuLabel | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the label element. |
| DropdownMenuLabel | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the label element. |
| DropdownMenuRadioGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The group's DropdownMenuRadioItem options. |
| DropdownMenuRadioGroup | Value | `string?` | `` | The currently selected item's value. Controlled together with ValueChanged; when left unbound the group tracks the selection internally. |
| DropdownMenuRadioGroup | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` | Fires when the user selects a different radio item. |
| DropdownMenuRadioGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the group's role="group" container. |
| DropdownMenuRadioItem | Context | `DropdownMenuRadioGroup.DropdownMenuRadioGroupContext` | `default!` |  |
| DropdownMenuRadioItem | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuRadioItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The item's label content, rendered after the selection dot. |
| DropdownMenuRadioItem | Value | `string` | `""` | The value this item represents. Selecting it sets the parent DropdownMenuRadioGroup's value to this. |
| DropdownMenuRadioItem | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the item's root button. |
| DropdownMenuRadioItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the item's root button. |
| DropdownMenuSeparator | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the separator line. |
| DropdownMenuSeparator | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the separator line. |
| DropdownMenuShortcut | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The shortcut hint text (e.g. "⌘K"). |
| DropdownMenuShortcut | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the shortcut span. |
| DropdownMenuShortcut | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the shortcut span. |
| DropdownMenuSub | RootContext | `DropdownMenu.DropdownMenuContext?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSub | ParentSubContext | `DropdownMenuSubContext?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSub | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The submenu's trigger and content (typically a DropdownMenuSubTrigger plus a DropdownMenuSubContent). |
| DropdownMenuSub | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the submenu's root wrapper. |
| DropdownMenuSubContent | SubContext | `DropdownMenuSub.DropdownMenuSubContext` | `default!` |  |
| DropdownMenuSubContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The submenu's items (typically DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuSeparator, etc.). |
| DropdownMenuSubContent | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the submenu panel. |
| DropdownMenuSubContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the submenu panel. |
| DropdownMenuSubTrigger | SubContext | `DropdownMenuSub.DropdownMenuSubContext` | `default!` |  |
| DropdownMenuSubTrigger | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSubTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The trigger's label content, rendered before the chevron indicator. |
| DropdownMenuSubTrigger | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | When true, the trigger is not clickable/focusable and cannot open the submenu. |
| DropdownMenuSubTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger's root button. |
| DropdownMenuSubTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger's root button. |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | Context | `DropdownMenu.DropdownMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The trigger's content, rendered inside the wrapper (or forwarded into ChildContentSlot when AsChild is set). |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | ChildContentSlot | `RenderFragment<TriggerSlot>?` | `` | Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild. |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | AsChild | `bool` | `false` | When true, renders NO wrapper and cascades a TriggerSlot (carrying group + data-state so a descendant chevron still rotates, plus the trigger id and menu ARIA) that a cooperating child folds onto its own single root element — the Radix asChild goal. Prefer a <button> child. Default false keeps the current role=button wrapper. |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | When true the trigger ignores clicks and is marked aria-disabled. The live @onclick sits on this outer role="button" element, not the wrapped Button, so disabling only the inner button (as DropdownButton/SplitButton do) previously still let a click on the trigger padding open the menu — this gates that. |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger wrapper (ignored when AsChild is set — the child owns its own classes via the slot). |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger wrapper (or merges into the TriggerSlot's attributes when AsChild is set). |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenu) — The trigger and content that make up the menu (typically a DropdownMenuTrigger plus a DropdownMenuContent).
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuCheckboxItem) — The item's label content, rendered after the checkmark indicator.
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuContent) — The menu's items (typically DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuSeparator, etc.).
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuGroup) — The grouped menu items, typically a run of DropdownMenuItem.
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuItem) — The item's label content.
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuLabel) — The label text or markup.
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuRadioGroup) — The group's DropdownMenuRadioItem options.
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuRadioItem) — The item's label content, rendered after the selection dot.
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuShortcut) — The shortcut hint text (e.g. "⌘K").
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuSub) — The submenu's trigger and content (typically a DropdownMenuSubTrigger plus a DropdownMenuSubContent).
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuSubContent) — The submenu's items (typically DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuSeparator, etc.).
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuSubTrigger) — The trigger's label content, rendered before the chevron indicator.
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuTrigger) — The trigger's content, rendered inside the wrapper (or forwarded into ChildContentSlot when AsChild is set).
- `ChildContentSlot` (DropdownMenuTrigger) — Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

## Events
- `OpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`) — Fires whenever the open state changes (trigger click, Escape, click-outside, item selection).
- `IsOpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)

## Sub-components
- `DropdownMenuCheckboxItem`, `DropdownMenuContent`, `DropdownMenuGroup`, `DropdownMenuItem`, `DropdownMenuLabel`, `DropdownMenuRadioGroup`, `DropdownMenuRadioItem`, `DropdownMenuSeparator`, `DropdownMenuShortcut`, `DropdownMenuSub`, `DropdownMenuSubContent`, `DropdownMenuSubTrigger`, `DropdownMenuTrigger`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Density` (`Lumeo.Density?`)
- `Context` (`DropdownMenu.DropdownMenuContext`)
- `RootContext` (`DropdownMenu.DropdownMenuContext?`)
- `ParentSubContext` (`DropdownMenuSubContext?`)
- `SubContext` (`DropdownMenuSub.DropdownMenuSubContext`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<DropdownMenu />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-popover`, `--color-popover-foreground`, `--radius`

- `UI/DropdownMenu/DropdownMenuTrigger.razor`
